title: Chapter 81
content:
Chapter 81: Chapter 81: Improvement

A week passed just like that. Everyday Damon, Ariel and Selene do the same thing. Occasionally Damon feed Neko his Heavenly Tribulation Lightning or gave his yang qi and make her satisfied from pleasure.

Ariel train with Selene after that Selene train with Damon. And of course, every night Damon had sex with Ariel and Selene masturbate while at it.

At the next day after that night, Selene didn’t expect that Ariel and Damon to do that again.

But one the third night, it was Selene is the one who wait in her room, she waited Damon and Ariel to have sex, so she can watch it and masturbate, and she keep doing it every day even until last night.

Because of it Selene attitude toward Damon and Ariel slowly changing. At first she play indifferent, but now she blush sometime when she look at Damon and Ariel.

Now Damon stood in front of Selene who closed her eyes.

Although her mind focuses on making her sword intent come out of her hand without her sword, but Damon can see it, the development of her body as he open her status.

[Name: Selene Frostborn]

[Age: 35]

[Cultivation: Heavenly Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: Taking an interest]

[Interest: 95/100]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 80/100]

[Affinities: Ice: 65, Sword: 100]

[Spiritual Roots: Glacial Sword Spiritual Roots] [Heaven Grade - Low]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: Body of Ice Monarch] [Earth Grade - Peak]

[Traits: Cold, Sword Freak, Repressed Desire, Proud, Natural Sword Master]

’Hehehe, her body now getting used to her lust, I just need to push her a little to make her fall.’ Damon seeing that her lust always above 75.

While he thinking what should he do to make her fall, the atmosphere suddenly change.

Selene who seated in cross legged position in front of Damon, suddenly her body release a large amount of sword intent.

Then the sword intent began to move from around her body toward her arm. Seeing this, Damon’s lips began to spread wider.

"Congratulation, Elder Selene. As expected, you are talented."

Hearing what Damon said, Selene slowly open her eyes and look at him.

"What are you talking, about?" Selene asked Damon with confused eyes.

"Try, to make the sword intent from you hand now." Damon instruct her to do that.

Hearing that she stood up immediately and try out what Damon showed her on the first day of the training.

Then she let out her sword intent toward her arm and a sword shaped sword intent come out from her hand.

Seeing what happening to her arm she then turn around and walk to a practice dummy nearby.

She stood in front of it and casually swing her arm downward without touching the dummy.

Slash!

Then the dummy spilt into two, seeing this she then turn around again toward Damon and dash to him.

To Damon surprise Selene hugged him.

"Thank you. Thank you." Selene said excitedly.

Even though Selene was cold and acting proud at first, it was just to maintain her pride and dignity as an elder. She already get used to act like that since she became elder.

She not a person who don’t know to be grateful.

She know that Damon didn’t have to teach her or even he can teach her something wrong since mastering sword aura will take years at least.

But his teaching already shown a result in a short week.

"It’s just a beginning, now that you master your sword intent it’s time to learn the real sword aura."

Hearing Damon speak, she snapped out of her excitement and jump back with an embarrassed face.

"S-sorry, I was too excited."

"It’s okay, Its refreshing seeing a new expression on your face. You should act like that more often."

"No, I can’t. I have to maintain what I used to be." Selene said to Damon.

"Why?"

"..."

She stayed silent for a long time. Seeing this Damon didn’t press her.

"Anyway, Let’s start with Learning Sword Aura."

She simply nodded.

"Now you learn how to use sword intent without a sword. The next level will be compress your sword intent onto your body, make a layer of sword intent around your body."

Then Damon start to show her how to do it.

As Damon release his sword intent outward, making his sword intent spread out around the room.

After that he started to compress it into his body until it form a layer around his body like an invisible Armor.

"This is the base of sword aura. Like the name imply, it’s an aura of sword around you body. Then this is the basic application of sword aura..."

After he said that the compress layers sword intent of the sword aura began to spread out form his body until it make a 10-meter circular area around his body.

Seeing the real sword aura in front of her eyes, Selene couldn’t hide the excitement in her eyes.

"Grab something and throw it at me." Damon ask Selene.

Then Selene, grab a training sword from the rack an throw it at Damon. Once it enter Damon’s sword aura parameter, it sliced into multiple pieces then it continue cutting until the training sword turn into dust.

Seeing this Selene was shock because it was different form the sword aura that Damon use to attack her.

"But it different when you use it on the inner disciple test and when you attack me?" Selene couldn’t help but to ask.

"Well, what I used inner disciple test, I just learn it so I accidentally use it without realize it." Damon blatantly lie to her.

The actual reason he use the sword aura back than was to attract her interest.

"When I attack you it was the same concept as this but instead make it around my body I make it around my sword."

"Anymore question?"

"No."

"Good, I assume you know what you should do right?"

"Yes!"

"Okay, you can practice, if you need anything you know where to find me." Damon give her a sly smile.
